_comment: SDF VM Worlds Wave 6 — THE PROOF WAVE: a minimal RTS genre exhibit hosted on the SAME overworld abstractions (emitters, the view stack, the fixed-point query API) the platformer overworld uses. No consoles, no immersion — the room opens directly onto the RTS arena (Puck.Demo.Rts.RtsScenario's terrain/blockers), and the rts.* console verbs (rts.spawn/rts.select/rts.move/rts.list/rts.clear) drive a ~12-unit straight-line move-to-target sim, ground-snapped through Puck.SdfVm.Queries.IWorldQuery.
